title: Customer.io Event
description: An event in Customer.io representing a customer action or behavior tracked via the Track API or Pipelines API. Events are used to trigger campaigns, build segments, and personalize messages.

name.description: The event name describing the action the customer took.

type.description: The event type. Standard events have no type specified. Use page for page view events.

data.description: Custom data associated with the event. Any key-value pairs included are available for use in campaigns, segments, and message personalization.

timestamp.description: A UNIX timestamp of when the event occurred. If not provided, the current time is used.

anonymous_id.description: An anonymous identifier for events not yet associated with a known customer. Used for anonymous event tracking and later merging.

customer_id.description: The customer identifier the event is associated with.

EventContext.description: Contextual information about the event including device, location, and library details.

ip.description: The IP address of the user when the event occurred.

timezone.description: The IANA timezone of the user.

user_agent.description: The user agent string from the browser or device.
